The `src/query/index.rs` and `src/query/duckdb_backend.rs` matches are only inside comments. Let me confirm the final list of files with actual call sites:

The files with actual `parse_file(...)` call sites (not definitions, not comments) are:
- `src/index.rs` — `crate::parser::treesitter::parse_file(...)`
- `src/parser/c_lang.rs`
- `src/parser/cpp.rs`
- `src/parser/csharp.rs`
- `src/parser/go.rs`
- `src/parser/java.rs`
- `src/parser/javascript.rs`
- `src/parser/python.rs`
- `src/parser/ruby.rs`
- `src/parser/rust_lang.rs`
- `src/parser/treesitter.rs` — `parse_file(&block.content, ...)`
- `src/parser/typescript.rs`
